sentences.arabic: تُعَدُّ رِيَادَةُ الْأَعْمَالِ رَكِيزَةً أَسَاسِيَّةً فِي الِاقْتِصَادِ الْحَدِيثِ، حَيْثُ تُسَاهِمُ فِي خَلْقِ فُرَصِ عَمَلٍ جَدِيدَةٍ وَتَحْفِيزِ النُّمُوِّ الْمُسْتَدَامِ.
sentences.translation: Poduzetništvo se smatra temeljnim stubom moderne ekonomije, jer doprinosi stvaranju novih radnih mjesta i podsticanju održivog rasta.
sentences.translationEn: Entrepreneurship is considered a fundamental pillar of the modern economy, as it contributes to creating new job opportunities and stimulating sustainable growth.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ النَّجَاحَ فِي هَذَا الْمَجَالِ يَتَطَلَّبُ رُؤْيَةً ثَاقِبَةً وَقُدْرَةً عَالِيَةً عَلَى إِدَارَةِ الْمَخَاطِرِ الْمُحْتَمَلَةِ بِحِكْمَةٍ وَتَرَوٍّ.
sentences.translation: Uspjeh u ovoj oblasti zahtijeva oštru viziju i visoku sposobnost mudrog i promišljenog upravljanja potencijalnim rizicima.
sentences.translationEn: Success in this field requires a keen vision and a high ability to manage potential risks with wisdom and deliberation.

sentences.arabic: وَمِمَّا لَا شَكَّ فِيهِ أَنَّ الِابْتِكَارَ الْمُسْتَمِرَّ هُوَ مَا يُمَيِّزُ الشَّرِكَاتِ النَّاشِئَةَ الطَّمُوحَةَ عَنْ غَيْرِهَا فِي سُوقٍ شَدِيدِ التَّنَافُسِ.
sentences.translation: Nema sumnje da je kontinuirana inovacija ono što razlikuje ambiciozne startapove od drugih na visoko konkurentnom tržištu.
sentences.translationEn: Undoubtedly, continuous innovation is what distinguishes ambitious startups from others in a highly competitive market.

sentences.arabic: وَلَوْلَا الدَّعْمُ الْمُؤَسَّسِيُّ وَتَوْفِيرُ الْبِيئَةِ التَّشْرِيعِيَّةِ الْمُلَائِمَةِ، لَمَا اسْتَطَاعَ الْمُبْدِعُونَ تَحْوِيلَ أَفْكَارِهِمْ إِلَى مَشَارِيعَ وَاقِعِيَّةٍ مُثْمِرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Da nije bilo institucionalne podrške i obezbjeđivanja odgovarajućeg zakonodavnog okvira, inovatori ne bi mogli pretvoriti svoje ideje u plodonosne, stvarne projekte.
sentences.translationEn: Were it not for institutional support and the provision of an appropriate legislative environment, innovators would not have been able to turn their ideas into fruitful, real-world projects.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي الْخِتَامِ، يَبْقَى الصَّبْرُ وَالتَّعَلُّمُ الذَّاتِيُّ الدَّائِمُ هُمَا الْمِفْتَاحُ لِتَجَاوُزِ الْعَقَبَاتِ وَتَحْقِيقِ الرِّيَادَةِ فِي عَالَمِ الْأَعْمَالِ.
sentences.translation: Na kraju, strpljenje i trajno samoučenje ostaju ključ za prevazilaženje prepreka i postizanje liderstva u svijetu biznisa.
sentences.translationEn: In conclusion, patience and continuous self-learning remain the key to overcoming obstacles and achieving leadership in the business world.
